heading: Board action
label: 1322 Board action
notes: Amendments2015— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 114–110section 722 of this title
amendments: Amendments2015— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 114–110section 722 of this title

children.heading: .—Effective Date of Actions
children.label: a .—Effective Date of Actions
children.text: Unless otherwise provided in subtitle IV, the Board may determine, within a reasonable time, when its actions, other than an action ordering the payment of money, take effect.

children.heading: .—Terminating and Changing Actions
children.label: b .—Terminating and Changing Actions
children.text: An action of the Board remains in effect under its own terms or until superseded. The Board may change, suspend, or set aside any such action on notice. Notice may be given in a manner determined by the Board. A court of competent jurisdiction may suspend or set aside any such action.
grant rehearing, reargument, or reconsideration of an action of the Board; or
change an action of the Board.

children.heading: .—Finality of Actions
children.label: d .—Finality of Actions
children.text: Notwithstanding subtitle IV, an action of the Board under this section is final on the date on which it is served, and a civil action to enforce, enjoin, suspend, or set aside the action may be filed after that date.
